query:
SELECT a.id, a.cliente, a.estado, a.producto, a.parada_id,
       p.id as pid, p.cobertizo_id
FROM anuncios a
LEFT JOIN paradas p ON a.parada_id = p.id
WHERE a.id = 420001;

       p.id as pid, p.cobertizo_id
